store.name: World Vibe Web
store.tagline: The distributed app store for vibe-coded projects.

featured.headline: COMMUNITY FAVORITE
featured.title: The world's most-starred prompt collection.
featured.subtitle: With 150K+ GitHub stars, Prompts.chat is the definitive home for AI prompts. Browse hundreds of curated starters for ChatGPT, Claude, and Gemini — or self-host the entire thing for your team in minutes.

featured.headline: EDITOR'S PICK
featured.title: Every video, beautifully yours.
featured.subtitle: Macabolic wraps the legendary yt-dlp engine in a polished native Mac interface — download anything from YouTube to Instagram in up to 4K, skip sponsors automatically, and grab whole playlists without touching the terminal.

featured.headline: HIDDEN GEM
featured.title: Ship to the App Store without leaving your shell.
featured.subtitle: asc puts the full App Store Connect API at your fingertips — builds, TestFlight, screenshots, subscriptions, and code signing — all scriptable, AI-agent-ready, and CI-friendly out of the box.

featured.headline: MUST TRY
featured.title: Diagrams that zoom, pan, and dazzle.
featured.subtitle: Drop one plugin into your VitePress site and every Mermaid block becomes a living, interactive diagram — fullscreen, theme-aware, and exportable as SVG or PNG with a single click.

apps.name: Agent Chess
apps.subtitle: Local chess matches for AI agents
apps.description: Run a local chess game where two AI agents join, play moves, and follow a live board.
apps.longDescription: Agent Chess is a TypeScript CLI for pitting two AI agents against each other in a local chess game. Agents join the same match, submit moves one turn at a time, can negotiate draws, and can watch the live board in a local web UI.
features: Two AI agents can join the same local game and play turn by turn
Built-in draw request and accept flow
Live local web UI for board state, move history, and replay

apps.name: Agentlytics
apps.subtitle: AI Coding Agent Analytics
apps.description: Comprehensive analytics dashboard for AI coding agents — Cursor, Windsurf, Claude Code, VS Code Copilot, Zed, Antigravity, OpenCode, Command Code. One command to turn scattered AI conversations into a unified analytics dashboard.
apps.longDescription: You switch between Cursor, Windsurf, Claude Code, VS Code Copilot, and more — each with its own siloed conversation history. Agentlytics gives you a full picture with one command: npx agentlytics. Dashboard with KPIs, activity heatmap, editor breakdown, coding streaks, token economy. Session search and full conversation replay. Cost estimation broken down by model, editor, project. Team context sharing via Relay with MCP integration. 100% local — no data ever leaves your machine.
features: Dashboard with KPIs and activity heatmaps
Cost estimation by model and editor
100% local — no data leaves your machine

apps.name: AI User Scripts
apps.subtitle: AI-powered browser scripts
apps.description: A collection of AI-enhanced user scripts for automating and improving browser workflows.

apps.name: AI Word or Not
apps.subtitle: Human or AI? Word quiz game
apps.description: Can you tell the difference between AI-generated and human-written text? Test your skills with hundreds of challenges across multiple difficulty levels.
features: Hundreds of AI vs human challenges

apps.name: AI2image
apps.subtitle: AI image generation platform
apps.description: Generate stunning images with AI. Create Studio Ghibli style, realistic, and artistic images using AI prompts.

apps.name: AI2SQL
apps.subtitle: Generate SQL queries with AI
apps.description: AI-powered SQL query generator. Write complex SQL without knowing SQL syntax. Supports MySQL, PostgreSQL, MongoDB, and more.
apps.longDescription: AI2SQL helps developers, data analysts, and non-technical users generate SQL queries using natural language. Paste your schema, describe what you want, get production-ready SQL. Supports multiple databases including MySQL, PostgreSQL, SQL Server, MongoDB, and Oracle.

apps.name: Appétit
apps.subtitle: Bon Appétit for Apps
apps.description: An Apple App Store-inspired catalog of free, tiny apps built with agentic engineering and vibecoding. Pure HTML/CSS/JS — no frameworks, no build step.
apps.longDescription: Appétit is an open-source, JSON-driven app store clone that showcases your projects in a beautiful, browsable catalog. Features a dark/light theme, sidebar navigation, featured carousel, app detail pages with screenshots, brew/npx install modals, instant search, and GitHub star counts. All content lives in a single apps.json file — edit it and deploy. Built entirely with vanilla HTML, CSS, and JS using agentic engineering and vibecoding. No frameworks, no build step, deploys anywhere as static files.
features: Dark and light theme with system preference
Featured carousel, app cards, detail pages
Brew / npx install modals with clipboard copy
Built with agentic engineering and vibecoding

apps.name: asc
apps.subtitle: App Store Connect from your terminal & AI agents
apps.description: A Swift CLI for managing iOS and macOS apps on App Store Connect — builds, releases, TestFlight, subscriptions, screenshots, and more. Full AI-agent support via CAEOAS affordances.
apps.longDescription: asc is a command-line tool that brings the full power of App Store Connect to your terminal. Automate builds, releases, TestFlight distribution, subscriptions, in-app purchases, screenshots, app previews, code signing, and customer reviews — all from a single CLI. Every command outputs structured JSON with CAEOAS affordances, so AI agents can navigate the entire release workflow without knowing the command tree. Works in CI pipelines (GitHub Actions) and supports multi-account authentication.
features: List apps, create versions, link builds, submit for App Store review
Archive Xcode projects, export IPA/PKG, upload to App Store Connect
Manage TestFlight beta groups, testers, and beta review submissions
In-app purchases, subscriptions, offers, and offer codes
AI-powered App Store screenshot generation via Gemini
Code signing: bundle IDs, certificates, devices, profiles
Executable plugin system for custom event handlers
CAEOAS affordances — AI agents navigate without knowing the command tree

apps.name: Awesome OpenClaw Agents
apps.subtitle: 103 open source AI agent templates
apps.description: Curated collection of 103 ready-to-deploy AI agent templates across 19 categories. SOUL.md configurations for OpenClaw framework.
features: Ready to deploy with OpenClaw CLI

apps.name: Baby Sleeper
apps.subtitle: Soothing Sounds & Lullabies for Babies
apps.description: Soothing sounds and lullabies to help babies fall asleep. Developed with Flutter.
apps.longDescription: Baby Sleeper is a Flutter app packed with carefully curated soothing sounds and lullabies to help infants and toddlers drift off peacefully. Choose from white noise, nature sounds, and classic lullabies. Set a sleep timer and let the app do the rest.
features: White noise, nature sounds, and classic lullabies

apps.longDescription: Application connecting bakeries with users for leftover food.

apps.name: Booking Calendar
apps.subtitle: Self-hosted appointment scheduling with PWA support.
apps.description: A single-admin booking platform with shareable links, notifications, and self-hosted data ownership.
apps.longDescription: Booking Calendar is a self-hosted PWA for managing appointments without handing scheduling data to a third party. It includes admin scheduling controls, public booking pages, cancellation flows, notifications, webhooks, and SQLite-backed persistence aimed at practical small-scale booking workflows.
features: Admin dashboard for slots, appointments, and booking links
Conflict-safe booking flow with overlap prevention
Email, web push, and webhook notification support
Installable PWA backed by self-hosted SQLite storage

apps.name: Breathe Wisely
apps.subtitle: Simple Stress Relief
apps.description: A simple breathing exercise app designed for quick and effective stress relief.

apps.name: check-ai
apps.subtitle: AI-Readiness Audit for Repos
apps.description: Audit any repository for AI-readiness. One command. 66 checks. Zero dependencies. Scans for agent configs, repo hygiene, grounding docs, testing safety nets, prompt templates, MCP integrations, AI dependencies — and scores it all on a 0–10 scale.
apps.longDescription: check-ai runs 66 checks grouped into 8 sections: Repo Hygiene, Grounding Docs, Testing Safety Net, Agent Configs, AI Context, Prompts & Skills, MCP integrations, and AI Dependencies. Each check is weighted by real-world impact and normalized to a 0–10 score with letter grades. Detects configs for Cursor, Windsurf, Claude Code, GitHub Copilot, Codex, Gemini, Aider, and more. Interactive terminal output with animated score bars, or machine-readable JSON for CI pipelines. Zero dependencies — built entirely with Node.js built-ins.

apps.name: ClockSS
apps.subtitle: Minimal analog clock screen saver for macOS
apps.description: A customizable analog clock screen saver with color and font options. Built with Swift and AppKit.
apps.longDescription: ClockSS is a lightweight, customizable analog clock screen saver for macOS. Choose any system font for clock numerals, customize background and clock colors, and enjoy a smooth analog clock with hour, minute, and second hands. Supports English and Turkish localization. Universal binary for Apple Silicon and Intel.
features: Smooth analog clock with hour, minute, and second hands
All system fonts available for clock numerals

apps.name: ColdCase
apps.subtitle: Online Detective Game
apps.description: An interactive detective game where players investigate unsolved cases, analyze clues, and connect evidence to uncover the truth. Designed as a mobile-first experience, ColdCase lets players step into the role of a digital detective and solve mysteries through immersive case files and investigation mechanics.
apps.longDescription: ColdCase is a mobile-first detective game where every case is a mystery waiting to be solved. Dive into detailed case files, examine evidence photos, cross-reference witness statements, and piece together the clues to name your suspect. Each case is crafted to challenge your deductive reasoning — can you close the case before the trail goes cold?
features: Analyze clues, evidence photos, and witness statements
Connect the dots and name your suspect
Mobile-first design with intuitive investigation mechanics

apps.name: Deeper
apps.subtitle: Messaging Analytics for Beeper
apps.description: A macOS messaging analytics app for Beeper — visualize your conversations across every platform, with on-device AI. See who you talk to most, discover your active hours, find ghosting patterns, explore group dynamics.
apps.longDescription: Deeper connects to your local Beeper Desktop app and turns your messaging data into beautiful, interactive analytics. It merges contacts across platforms (iMessage, WhatsApp, Instagram, Telegram, Signal, X/Twitter, and more), analyzes sent vs received message patterns, and visualizes everything with native macOS charts and Liquid Glass effects. Uses Apple Intelligence (on-device) for conversation summaries — no cloud, no API keys. All data stays on your machine.
apps.requirements: macOS 26 Tahoe or later, Beeper Desktop
features: Word frequency analysis and word clouds
Liquid Glass UI with native macOS 26 design

apps.name: En Yakın Eczaneyi Bul
apps.subtitle: Nearest Pharmacy Finder — Telegram Bot
apps.description: A Telegram bot that finds the nearest or on-duty pharmacies around you. Returns name, address, telephone and map location. Works in Türkiye.
apps.longDescription: En Yakın Eczaneyi Bul is a Telegram bot that locates the closest open or on-duty pharmacies in Türkiye based on your shared location. It responds with the pharmacy name, address, phone number, and a direct map link — perfect for late-night situations when you need to find a nöbetçi eczane quickly.
features: Find the nearest open or on-duty pharmacy by location
Returns name, address, phone number, and map link
Also finds nöbetçi eczane (late-night on-duty pharmacies)

apps.longDescription: En Yakın Hastaneyi Bul is a Telegram bot that, given your location, instantly returns the name, address, phone number, and map link for the nearest hospitals in Türkiye. Just share your location in the chat and the bot takes care of the rest.
features: Share your location to find the nearest hospitals
Returns name, address, phone number, and map link

apps.name: Env Protector
apps.subtitle: Keep .env secrets hidden before they reach the editor.
apps.description: A VS Code extension that intercepts environment files and lets you view or manage them safely.
apps.longDescription: Env Protector is a VS Code extension built around a security-first workflow for `.env` files. Instead of masking secrets after a file opens, it intercepts access before rendering, offers a masked view, and lets you add, edit, or remove variables without exposing raw values during screen sharing or recordings.
features: Intercept .env file opening before secrets render on screen
Masked virtual view for reviewing keys without exposing values
Add, edit, and remove variables without opening the raw file
Workspace-level hiding of sensitive env files in the explorer

apps.subtitle: Galaksiyi Koru, Muhafızlarını Topla!
apps.description: A browser-based space action game. Defend the galaxy, collect guardians, upgrade your weapons, and fight through waves of enemies.
apps.longDescription: Galaksinin Muhafızları is a browser-based space action game built with pure HTML/CSS/JS. Use WASD to move, mouse to aim, and click to shoot. Features include a leveling system, in-game shop with upgrades (Mega Attack, Super Health, Light Speed, Titan Armor, Extra Ammo), the ability to summon knights, super powers, and life-steal mechanics. Fight through increasingly difficult waves, upgrade your guardian, and save the galaxy from darkness.

apps.name: git-rewrite-commits
apps.subtitle: AI-Powered Commit Message Rewriter
apps.description: AI-powered git commit message rewriter using Ollama or GPT. Automatically rewrite your entire git commit history with better, conventional commit messages.
apps.longDescription: Rewrite your entire git commit history with AI-generated conventional commit messages. Perfect for cleaning up messy histories before open-sourcing projects. Supports OpenAI GPT and local Ollama models for privacy. Features smart filtering to skip well-formed commits, multi-language support, git hooks integration for automatic messages on every commit, batch processing with rate limiting, dry-run mode, custom templates, and quality scoring. Always creates backups before rewriting.
features: OpenAI GPT or local Ollama support

apps.name: Git Search AI
apps.subtitle: AI-Powered Git Commit Search for VS Code
apps.description: AI-powered Git commit history and code search tool for VS Code. Running on your local machine, it helps you find the code you need in seconds.
apps.longDescription: Git Search AI is a VS Code extension that uses AI to search through your entire git commit history and codebase semantically. Simply describe what you are looking for in plain language and the extension surfaces the relevant commits and code changes instantly — all running privately on your local machine.
features: AI-powered semantic search across git history
Runs entirely on your local machine — no cloud, no tracking
Find code changes by describing them in natural language

apps.name: GitHub Repo Manager & Cleaner
apps.subtitle: AI-powered GitHub repository management
apps.description: Electron desktop app for managing, cleaning, and organizing GitHub repositories with AI-powered features like smart rename, README generation, and commit analysis.
apps.longDescription: A comprehensive Electron desktop application that streamlines GitHub repository management with AI-powered features. Manage all your repositories with source/fork distinction, publish local projects to GitHub with smart .gitignore generation, analyze stale and large repos, sync forks, and leverage AI for smart renaming, description generation, README creation, and commit message optimization using Conventional Commits standards.
features: View and manage all GitHub repositories with Source/Fork filtering
Publish local folders to GitHub with smart .gitignore generation
AI Smart Rename and description generation via OpenRouter API
AI-powered README creation and commit message analysis
Repository analysis: stale repos, large repos, unchanged forks
Fork sync status checking and one-click synchronization
Commit message templates: Simple, Conventional, Scoped, Custom
apps.requirements: GitHub Personal Access Token, OpenRouter API Key (for AI features)

apps.name: GPVBlazor
apps.subtitle: Explore GitHub profiles, repos, gists, and star history.
apps.description: A Blazor-based GitHub profile explorer with analytics, charts, and repository insights.
apps.longDescription: GPVBlazor is a responsive GitHub profile viewer built with Blazor Server. It combines user search, repository browsing, gist viewing, README previews, star history charts, and profile statistics into a single interface for exploring open-source activity in more depth than the default GitHub profile pages.
features: Search GitHub users with profile, repo, and gist exploration
Interactive star history and profile statistics visualizations
README preview and repository filtering in one interface
Authentication options to extend GitHub API rate limits

apps.name: GuidGenerator for Visual Studio
apps.subtitle: GUID Generator Extension for Visual Studio
apps.description: Generate and insert GUIDs effortlessly into your code using a simple shortcut. A Visual Studio extension by kocdev.
apps.longDescription: GuidGenerator for Visual Studio is the classic IDE companion to the VS Code edition. It generates and inserts GUIDs directly into your code with a keyboard shortcut, keeping you in the flow without switching to an external tool. Available on the Visual Studio Marketplace.
features: Generate and insert GUIDs with a keyboard shortcut

apps.name: GuidGenerator
apps.subtitle: GUID Generator Extension for VS Code
apps.description: Generate and insert GUIDs (UUID) effortlessly into your code using a simple shortcut. A VS Code extension by kocdev.
apps.longDescription: GuidGenerator is a lightweight VS Code extension that generates and inserts RFC 4122-compliant GUIDs (UUIDs) directly into your code with a single keyboard shortcut. No more leaving your editor to copy a GUID from an online tool — just trigger the command and it is inserted at your cursor.
features: Generate RFC 4122-compliant GUIDs with a shortcut
Insert GUID directly at cursor position

apps.name: Bluetooth Audio Manager
apps.subtitle: A2DP Bluetooth audio for Home Assistant
apps.description: Home Assistant add-on for managing Bluetooth audio device connections (A2DP) with persistent pairing, auto-reconnect, and AppArmor security.
apps.longDescription: Bluetooth Audio Manager is a Home Assistant add-on that turns your HA instance into a Bluetooth audio hub. It supports A2DP streaming with persistent device pairing, automatic reconnection, RSSI-based device monitoring, and full AppArmor security. Manage everything through an integrated ingress UI with real-time WebSocket updates. Includes optional per-device MPD instances for TTS and media playback automations.
apps.requirements: Home Assistant OS or Supervised installation with Bluetooth adapter
features: One-click scan, pair, connect, and disconnect from the web UI
Per-device idle modes: Power Save, Stay Awake, or Auto-Disconnect
Per-device MPD instances exposed as media_player entities for TTS
AVRCP media buttons for hardware volume and playback control
Multi-adapter support with friendly USB device names
Real-time Events view and filterable Logs viewer
Dark mode with automatic system theme detection
Custom AppArmor profile enforcing least-privilege access

apps.name: Hono Telescope
apps.subtitle: Monitoring dashboard for Hono apps
apps.description: An open-source monitoring and debugging tool for Hono applications. Real-time dashboard to inspect requests, exceptions, logs, and database queries.
apps.longDescription: Hono Telescope provides a real-time dashboard for Hono applications running on Node.js and Bun. Middleware-based setup gives you instant visibility into API requests with URL, method, response time, and status codes. Tracks unhandled exceptions with stack traces, collects console logs tied to request context, and monitors database queries from Prisma, Sequelize, MongoDB, and Bun SQLite with execution times.
features: Real-time request monitoring with response times
Log viewer tied to request context
Database query logging for Prisma, Sequelize, MongoDB

apps.name: HTWind
apps.subtitle: HTML widgets and PowerShell tools for the Windows desktop.
apps.description: A desktop widget manager that brings HTML widgets, automation, and live editing to Windows.
apps.longDescription: HTWind is a customizable Windows widget manager built around HTML-based widgets. It supports desktop widgets, PowerShell execution, live preview editing, tray workflows, visibility rules, and persistent widget state so desktop tooling stays practical instead of decorative.
features: HTML desktop widgets with lock and unlock interaction modes
Built-in PowerShell execution for quick system actions
Live widget editor with hot reload preview
Tray integration and smart fullscreen visibility suppression

apps.name: Istanbul
apps.subtitle: Ambient Istanbul Soundscapes
apps.description: A macOS menu bar app for ambient Istanbul soundscapes from BBC Rewind. 18 ambient recordings captured on location across Istanbul — perfect as background white noise for focus or relaxation.
apps.longDescription: Istanbul is a free, open-source macOS menu bar app that plays ambient sounds recorded in Istanbul on a continuous loop. Featuring 18 recordings from the BBC Rewind Sound Effects library: street atmosphere, spice market, covered bazaar, café backgammon, ferry crossings, Hagia Sophia interior, Blue Mosque, and more. Sounds download as MP3 on first play and are cached locally for offline use. Native Swift/SwiftUI — no Electron, no runtime dependencies.
features: Menu bar only — clean and minimal

features: Hide mode and highlight mode for viewed job posts

apps.name: MCP Tools
apps.subtitle: Swiss Army Knife for MCP Servers
apps.description: A comprehensive CLI for interacting with MCP (Model Context Protocol) servers. Discover, call, and manage tools, resources, and prompts from any MCP-compatible server.
apps.longDescription: MCP Tools provides a versatile CLI for working with Model Context Protocol servers. Discover and call tools, access resources, create mock servers for testing, proxy MCP requests to shell scripts, create interactive shells, scaffold new MCP projects with TypeScript, and guard/restrict access to specific tools. Supports HTTP and stdio transports, multiple output formats (JSON, pretty-printed, table), server aliases, and LLM app config management. Built in Go.
features: Discover and call MCP server tools

apps.name: Mergen ADE
apps.subtitle: Organize multiple project terminals in one native workspace
apps.description: Native Rust terminal workspace for keeping multiple project contexts visible and easy to switch on macOS.
apps.longDescription: Mergen ADE is a desktop terminal workspace for running and organizing multiple project contexts. It keeps multiple terminals visible in a native Rust UI with tiled panes, project grouping, and lightweight persisted state. The project is still Windows-first, but official releases now include a signed and notarized macOS ARM64 DMG.
features: Embedded terminal panes with tiled layout management
Project-aware terminal grouping for fast context switches
Native PTY-backed shell sessions in a lightweight Rust desktop app
Small persisted config that restores useful workspace state

apps.name: Mermaid Viewer
apps.subtitle: Live Mermaid editor with instant preview and sharing.

apps.longDescription: Mermaid Viewer is a full web application for creating and sharing Mermaid diagrams with a polished editing workflow. It combines a Next.js frontend and NestJS backend so users can edit diagrams live, preview changes instantly, and share results through a purpose-built diagram interface rather than a raw code editor alone.
features: Real-time Mermaid editing with live preview

Monorepo setup with Next.js frontend and NestJS backend
Designed for fast iteration on documentation and diagramming

apps.name: Munch
apps.subtitle: Can you beat the computer at the game of Munch?
apps.description: Play the classic poison-apple strategy game in your browser and try to avoid the losing move.
apps.longDescription: Munch is a browser game where players take turns eating apples from a grid, and whoever is forced to eat the poison apple loses. This version pits you against a computer opponent built around a solved strategy for the 5x6 board.

features: Play Munch instantly in the browser

Learn the poison-apple rules through live play

apps.name: My Net Worth
apps.subtitle: All your stocks, ETFs, crypto wallets, 401(k), on one page
apps.description: See stocks, ETFs, crypto wallets, retirement accounts, and debt on one page with hourly price updates and no account connections.
apps.longDescription: My Net Worth was built to put Fidelity 401(k)s, Vanguard investments, E-Trade and IBKR stocks, bank accounts, and crypto wallets on one page. It is intentionally simple and safe: nothing connects directly to your accounts, and live prices refresh hourly so you can track your full portfolio across TradFi and DeFi in one place.
apps.requirements: Chrome on Windows, Mac, Linux, iPhone, and Android.
features: Track traditional and crypto assets together on one page
Support Yahoo Finance symbols plus Bitcoin, Ethereum and EVM wallets, and Solana wallets
Keep accounts disconnected while prices refresh hourly

apps.name: My Plants
apps.subtitle: Auto plant watering app.
apps.description: IoT connected plant watering system.
apps.longDescription: IoT connected plant watering system.

apps.name: Number Match
apps.subtitle: Number match game app.
apps.description: This is a simple number matching game in Python.
apps.longDescription: The goal of the game is to find adjacent numbers on the board and match them. The higher the value of the matched numbers, the more points the player wins.

apps.name: Outlook CLI
apps.subtitle: Outlook 365 from your terminal
apps.description: Read, send, search, and manage Outlook 365 emails, calendar, and contacts from the terminal. No API keys or admin consent required.
apps.longDescription: A full-featured CLI for Outlook 365 with 30+ commands — inbox, send, reply, forward, drafts, scheduled send, calendar CRUD, categories, signatures, attachments, and contacts. Uses browser-based token capture via Playwright so there's no Azure app registration, admin consent, or API keys to configure. Auto-JSON output when piped, structured envelope format, and short display numbers for quick message referencing.
features: Inbox with filters — sender, subject, date, attachments, categories
Send, reply, forward with confirmation prompts
Drafts and scheduled send with flexible time formats
Full calendar CRUD — create, update, delete, recurring events
Auto-JSON output when piped — no flag needed
Browser-based auth — no API keys or admin consent

apps.name: Personal Website
apps.subtitle: osmankoc.dev — Next.js & TypeScript
apps.description: osmankoc.dev — Personal portfolio and blog site. Built with Next.js, TypeScript, and Tailwind CSS.
apps.longDescription: osmankoc.dev is Osman Koç’s personal website and blog, built with Next.js 14, TypeScript, and Tailwind CSS. It features a portfolio of projects, a blog powered by Medium RSS feed, talks and presentations, and a clean minimal design. The source code is open on GitHub.
features: Built with Next.js 14, TypeScript, and Tailwind CSS
Blog powered by Medium RSS integration

apps.name: PhilNav
apps.subtitle: Infrared head mouse for hands-free computer control
apps.description: Control your computer hands-free with a reflective sticker and a Raspberry Pi-powered infrared head mouse running at 75 FPS.
apps.longDescription: PhilNav is a custom infrared head mouse that lets you move the cursor hands-free by tracking a reflective sticker on your head. The software is open source on GitHub, and this listing points to the assembled Gumroad hardware package built by Philip Brocoum for accessibility-focused computing.
apps.requirements: Raspberry Pi hardware on the server side plus a Windows, Mac, or Linux client machine.
features: Hands-free cursor movement using infrared head tracking
Runs at 75 FPS with low-latency mouse control
Cross-platform client support for Windows, macOS, and Linux

apps.name: PinkCloud Timer
apps.subtitle: Personal sobriety companion
apps.description: A personal sobriety companion that tracks your journey and celebrates your milestones.

apps.name: Pixel Guess
apps.subtitle: Guess the character behind the pixels
apps.description: An engaging web game where players identify pixelated images from categories like League of Legends, Valorant, and Demon Slayer.
apps.longDescription: Pixel Guess is a guessing game where you reveal hidden characters pixel by pixel. Pick a category, choose Easy or Hard difficulty, and try to identify the character before the image is fully revealed. Track your streak, compete on global leaderboards, and challenge yourself across multiple categories. Supports 12 languages.
features: Multiple categories: LoL, Valorant, Demon Slayer and more

apps.name: Pixel Guess Mobile
apps.subtitle: Pixel guessing game for iOS
apps.description: The mobile version of Pixel Guess — guess pixelated characters on your phone with smooth animations and native performance.
apps.longDescription: Pixel Guess Mobile brings the pixel guessing experience to iOS. Built with Expo and React Native, it features smooth Skia-powered animations, multiple game categories, Easy and Hard difficulty modes, streak tracking, global leaderboards, and confetti celebrations on correct guesses. Search characters with smart autocomplete and compete with players worldwide.
features: Native iOS app built with Expo

apps.name: Podcast Ad Remover
apps.subtitle: Skip the ads, keep the content
apps.description: Automatically detects and removes advertisements from podcast audio files.

apps.name: Poker Tracker
apps.subtitle: Track your live poker PnL with a simple web app
apps.description: Easily track your poker PnL.
apps.longDescription: Poker Tracker is a lightweight web app for tracking live poker winnings and losses over time. It focuses on fast entry and clear bankroll visibility without the overhead of a larger gambling analytics platform.
apps.requirements: Web browser on desktop or mobile.
features: Track poker winnings and losses in the browser
Keep a running PnL history for live play
Simple interface built for personal bankroll tracking

apps.name: product-planning-copilot
apps.subtitle: Documentation-first planning system teams can fork and adapt.
apps.description: A reusable repository template for PRDs, roadmaps, architecture notes, and planning quality gates.
apps.longDescription: product-planning-copilot is a forkable planning workspace for teams that want a consistent documentation-first process. It ships with project folder templates, requirement IDs, task and risk tracking conventions, reusable Copilot assets, and validation hooks that help planning artifacts stay structured as a project grows.
apps.requirements: GitHub repository access and Node.js for validation tooling
features: Project templates for briefs, PRDs, roadmaps, and architecture notes
Traceable requirement, task, and risk identifiers
Reusable Copilot instructions, prompts, and skill assets
Deterministic validation hook for planning quality gates

apps.name: Prompt Pilot
apps.subtitle: AI prompt guide & templates
apps.description: Discover, organize, and reuse high-performing prompts for ChatGPT, Claude, and Gemini. 170+ curated prompts and 50 customizable templates.

apps.name: Prompts.chat
apps.subtitle: Community Prompt Collection
apps.description: f.k.a. Awesome ChatGPT Prompts. Share, discover, and collect prompts from the community. Free and open source — self-host for your organization with complete privacy.
apps.longDescription: The largest community-driven prompt collection with over 151K GitHub stars. Originally known as Awesome ChatGPT Prompts, now evolved into a full web application. Browse, search, and contribute prompts for ChatGPT, Claude, Gemini, and other AI models. Features include community contributions, prompt categories, and the ability to self-host for your organization with complete privacy. Built with Next.js and TypeScript.

apps.name: The Interactive Book of Prompting
apps.subtitle: An Interactive Guide to AI Prompts
apps.description: A comprehensive interactive guide to crafting clear and effective AI prompts — from foundations to advanced techniques like chain-of-thought, few-shot learning, and agentic systems.
apps.longDescription: Written by Fatih Kadir Akın, curator of the 151K+ star Awesome ChatGPT Prompts repository. This interactive book covers how AI models think and process prompts, crafting clear and specific prompts, advanced techniques including chain-of-thought, few-shot learning, and prompt chaining, plus real-world use cases for writing, coding, education, and business. Features 25 interactive chapters with examples you can try directly in the browser. Continuously updated as AI evolves.
features: Try examples directly in the browser
Real-world use cases for writing, coding, education

apps.name: Avalon
apps.subtitle: Visual prompt IDE for AI editing, reverse engineering, and image workflows
apps.description: Edit structured prompts, import community examples, reverse engineer images, and generate visuals from one privacy-first workspace.
apps.longDescription: Avalon is a privacy-first visual prompt IDE for image generation and other AI workflows. Build and manage prompts as structured JSON in a tree editor, ask an AI assistant to rewrite only the field you are focused on, expand rough ideas into production-ready prompt structures, reverse engineer uploaded images into reusable prompts, browse prompts.chat and import community examples, then generate images with fal.ai or Wiro.ai. Prompts persist locally, API keys stay in sessionStorage, and the app can be installed as a PWA for a more native feel.
apps.requirements: Modern browser; your own OpenAI, Anthropic, or Google API key for AI features. Optional fal.ai or Wiro.ai API key for image generation.
features: Visual tree editor for nested JSON prompt editing
Natural-language AI assistant that rewrites only the selected field
Prompt expander that returns scene, style, subjects, palette, composition, and negative guidance
Reverse engineer uploaded images into reusable prompts with confidence and model hints
Browse prompts.chat and import community prompts into your local prompt library
Generate images with fal.ai or Wiro.ai using model and size or aspect controls
Local-first prompt storage with session-only API key handling
Installable PWA with responsive dashboard and editor layouts

apps.name: Captioneer
apps.subtitle: On-device live captions, translation, and OBS-ready overlays for macOS
apps.description: Transcribe microphone audio locally, translate it in real time, and publish overlay captions for streams, recordings, and presentations.
apps.longDescription: Captioneer is a privacy-first macOS menu bar app for live speech transcription and translation. It listens to your microphone with on-device Apple speech recognition, translates finalized lines, renders captions in top, bottom, or floating overlays, and can continuously write the latest caption text to a local file for OBS workflows. It is built for streamers, presenters, and recordings that need low-friction live subtitles without a cloud account in the core app flow.
features: On-device speech recognition with local-first transcription flow
Real-time translation into a target language
Top, bottom, or floating live caption overlays
Local text-file output for OBS and streaming overlays
Menu bar controls and persistent overlay settings
No account required for the core caption workflow

apps.name: Wiro CLI
apps.subtitle: Terminal client for discovering models, running tasks, and watching progress on Wiro AI
apps.description: Search models, submit runs, manage auth, and monitor task progress from the command line with interactive setup and output downloads.
apps.longDescription: Wiro CLI is a terminal client for Wiro AI that covers model discovery, interactive run submission, task inspection, cancellation, and live progress watching. It supports interactive first-run setup, dynamic input prompts generated from model schemas, multiple auth header modes, WebSocket progress with polling fallback, automatic output downloads with readable filenames, and both npm and direct binary installation flows. Secrets are stored in macOS Keychain when available, with a local fallback store for other environments.
apps.requirements: Node.js 18+ for npm install, or use the standalone release binaries on macOS, Linux, or Windows.
features: Interactive first-run setup for API key, secret, and project selection
Model search and inspection from the terminal
Dynamic run prompts generated from model schema inputs
Live task progress via WebSocket with polling fallback
Task detail, cancel, and kill commands
Automatic output downloads with readable filenames
macOS Keychain integration with fallback local secret storage

apps.name: Wiro Models Cleaner
apps.subtitle: Chrome extension that filters and declutters the wiro.ai models catalog
apps.description: Hide unwanted providers, filter model cards, and speed up the Wiro models workflow with shortcuts and a persistent control panel.
apps.longDescription: Wiro Models Cleaner is a Manifest V3 Chrome or Chromium extension for power users of wiro.ai/models. It lets you hide Wiro models or any provider list you do not want to see, filter cards by keyword, show only selected providers, use partner multi-select directly from the page, and keep those preferences synced with chrome.storage.sync. It also injects a page control panel, watches SPA route changes, compacts the grid after filtering, and adds a Cmd or Ctrl+Enter shortcut for the Run button on model detail pages.
apps.requirements: Chrome or another Chromium-based browser with Developer Mode enabled; works on https://wiro.ai/models.
features: Hide Wiro model cards or any unwanted provider set
Filter model cards by provider, keyword, or allowlist
Partner multi-select directly from provider links and tags
Persistent in-page control panel with live stats
Cmd or Ctrl+Enter shortcut for the Run button
chrome.storage.sync settings with instant page updates
SPA route watching and MutationObserver-based re-application

apps.name: Random Quotes
apps.subtitle: Daily Inspirational Quotes App
apps.description: Daily inspirational quotes app. Get motivated with a new quote every day. Developed with Flutter.
apps.longDescription: Random Quotes is a clean, minimal Flutter app that delivers a fresh inspirational quote each day. Browse quotes by category, save favorites, and share them with friends. Designed for simplicity and a distraction-free reading experience.
features: A new inspirational quote every day

apps.name: Reddit RSS API
apps.subtitle: Structured Reddit RSS feeds as filterable JSON.
apps.description: A Deno service that converts subreddit RSS feeds into JSON with filters, sorting, and random selection.
apps.longDescription: Reddit RSS API is a lightweight Deno-powered HTTP service that turns subreddit RSS feeds into structured JSON responses. It supports merging multiple subreddits, filtering media posts, sorting or shuffling results, limiting output size, and rewriting Reddit links for legacy old.reddit.com views.
features: Merge feeds from multiple subreddits into one response
Filter media posts or fetch a random post on demand
Sort chronologically or shuffle results with mixed mode
Serve CORS-friendly JSON from a zero-dependency Deno runtime

apps.name: Rerun Timer
apps.subtitle: The Infinite Loop Timer
apps.description: A looping timer that automatically restarts, perfect for interval training and recurring tasks.

apps.name: ReviseFlow
apps.subtitle: Client feedback, zero back-and-forth
apps.description: Collect visual feedback on staging websites and mobile apps with a lightweight widget, a React Native SDK, and a collaborative dashboard.
apps.longDescription: Your clients click, annotate, and comment directly on your website or app. Every revision request arrives with a screenshot pinned to exact pixels — plus the technical context to act on it immediately. From client click to draft PR — AI reads the feedback, finds the bug in your code, and opens a fix. No more vague emails, no more 'which page?' follow-ups.
features: Point & Click Annotations — pin feedback to exact pixels
AI-Powered Auto-Fix — from feedback to draft PR automatically
React Native SDK — shake to report from mobile apps
Auto-captured technical context (console, network, device info)

apps.name: Maps
apps.subtitle: Google Maps clone built with React Native.
apps.description: Navigation and map exploration application.
apps.longDescription: Navigation and map exploration application.

apps.name: SecretDrop
apps.subtitle: Share secrets securely
apps.description: Send passwords, API keys, and sensitive data through encrypted, self-destructing links.
apps.longDescription: SecretDrop lets you share sensitive information like passwords, API keys, and credentials through encrypted, one-time links that self-destruct after being viewed. No sign-up required for basic usage. Your secrets are encrypted end-to-end and never stored in plain text.
features: No sign-up required for basic usage

apps.name: Shelf
apps.subtitle: Multiple Floating Docks for macOS
apps.description: Multiple floating shelves for apps, links, and snippets — right where you need them. Your macOS dock, powered up. One dock isn't enough.
apps.longDescription: Shelf gives you multiple floating shelves you can place anywhere on your screen — each one holding apps, web links, and text snippets. Like your macOS dock, but unlimited. Drag apps from Finder, links from your browser, or text from anywhere. Features smart drag & drop, horizontal or vertical layouts, icon magnification on hover, and frosted glass design. Built with SwiftUI and AppKit — no Electron, no web views. Pure macOS.
features: Menu bar app — no Dock icon clutter

apps.name: Simple ToDo
apps.subtitle: Minimalist Todo List App
apps.description: Minimalist todo list app for daily tasks. Keep it simple, get it done. Developed with Flutter.
apps.longDescription: Simple ToDo is a no-frills Flutter app focused entirely on getting your tasks done. Add tasks, check them off, and move on — with no subscriptions, no accounts, and no distractions. Your tasks stay on your device.
features: Tasks stored locally on your device

apps.name: SoundShift
apps.subtitle: Discover how your music taste evolved
apps.description: Analyze your Spotify liked songs and visualize your genre journey over the years with interactive charts.
apps.longDescription: SoundShift analyzes your Spotify liked songs library and builds an interactive timeline showing how your music taste evolved year by year. It enriches genre data from Spotify, Last.fm, and MusicBrainz to create accurate genre breakdowns. Features include stacked area charts, year-by-year drill-down with song lists, shareable image cards, and a public landing page with community stats.
features: Genre evolution timeline with stacked area charts
Shareable image cards (Story, Post, Twitter formats)
Public landing page with community stats

apps.name: SQL Prep
apps.subtitle: SQL interview prep & quiz
apps.description: Learn SQL through 500+ interactive challenges. Practice SELECT, JOIN, subqueries, and window functions with instant feedback.
features: Covers SELECT, JOIN, subqueries, window functions

apps.name: superportless
apps.subtitle: Keep the exact same localhost origin while switching worktrees per tab.
apps.description: A local dev router that lets each browser tab connect to a different server without changing host or port.
apps.longDescription: vercel/portless is a clever idea, but subdomains change the origin and often force updates to CORS settings, OAuth redirect URLs, and environment configs. superportless takes a different approach: each browser tab can connect to a different local server while keeping the exact same host and port, such as localhost:3000. That means no subdomains, no origin change, and no application config changes. Just open multiple tabs and test multiple worktrees in parallel.
apps.requirements: macOS or Linux. Source builds require Go 1.21+ and a C compiler.
features: Each browser tab can route to a different local server while keeping the same localhost host and port
Avoids subdomains and origin changes that would otherwise affect CORS, OAuth redirects, and environment settings
Lets you test multiple worktrees in parallel without teaching the application about the routing tool
Includes Next.js-specific support for HMR and /api/* routing during development

apps.name: Tater Talk
apps.subtitle: The simplest speech-to-text dictation web-app on Win/Mac/Nix
apps.description: The easiest way to talk to your computer on Win, Mac, Linux, iOS, Android, and the browser with optional bring-your-own premium speech models.
apps.longDescription: Tater Talk is a browser-based dictation app built to make talking to your computer feel simple across Windows, macOS, Linux, iPhone, Android, and the web. The current version adds a polished redesign and bring-your-own API key support for premium speech-to-text providers such as Microsoft Azure and AssemblyAI.
apps.requirements: Chrome on Windows, Mac, Linux, iPhone, and Android.
features: Works across Win, Mac, Linux, iOS, Android, and desktop browsers
Supports bring-your-own API keys for premium speech-to-text models

apps.name: Terminal Alias Manager
apps.subtitle: Manage your shell aliases visually
apps.description: A native macOS app to manage your ~/.zshrc terminal aliases with a clean SwiftUI interface.
apps.longDescription: Terminal Alias Manager lets you visually manage your shell aliases without ever editing ~/.zshrc by hand. Add, edit, delete, enable/disable, search, sort, duplicate, backup, and import/export aliases — all from a native Finder-style interface. Changes are applied instantly with automatic source ~/.zshrc.
features: Add, edit, and delete aliases with validation
Search by name, command, or description
Sort by name, command, or status
Copy any command to clipboard instantly

apps.name: Textream
apps.subtitle: A Free macOS Teleprompter
apps.description: Textream is a free, open-source macOS app that guides you through your script with three modes: word tracking (highlights each word as you say it), classic (constant-speed auto-scroll), and voice-activated (scrolls while you speak, pauses when you're silent). It displays your text in a sleek Dynamic Island-style overlay at the top of your screen.
apps.longDescription: Built for streamers, interviewers, presenters, and podcasters. Paste your script, hit play, and start speaking. Features include real-time word tracking with on-device speech recognition, a Dynamic Island overlay, floating window mode, fullscreen on Sidecar iPad, remote connection for viewing on any device, and Director Mode for live control. Supports PowerPoint notes import, multi-page scripts, and adjustable fonts and colors. Completely private — all processing happens on-device.
features: Real-time word tracking with on-device speech recognition

apps.name: Trip Invoice
apps.subtitle: Invoice generation and management app.
apps.description: Invoice generation and tracking system built with React Native.
apps.longDescription: Invoice generation and tracking system built with React Native.

apps.name: Unified Audio Control
apps.subtitle: One control for all your audio
apps.description: Centralized audio management tool for controlling multiple audio sources from one interface.

apps.name: VitePress Mermaid Renderer
apps.subtitle: Interactive Mermaid diagrams for VitePress docs.
apps.description: A VitePress plugin that turns Mermaid code blocks into interactive diagrams with export and theme support.
apps.longDescription: Transform static Mermaid diagrams into interactive visualizations inside VitePress. The plugin adds zooming, panning, fullscreen mode, code copy, theme-aware rendering, and export options for documentation sites that need more than a static SVG.
apps.requirements: A VitePress project with Mermaid diagrams
features: Zoom, pan, and reset controls for complex Mermaid diagrams
Fullscreen mode for distraction-free diagram review
Theme-aware rendering that follows light and dark mode
Export diagrams as SVG, PNG, or JPG

apps.subtitle: Whisper made easy
apps.description: A convenient wrapper for OpenAI Whisper, simplifying speech-to-text transcription workflows.

apps.name: Whistle SOS
apps.subtitle: Emergency Whistle for Earthquake Situations
apps.description: Emergency whistle app for earthquake situations. Turn your phone into a loud whistle to signal for help when trapped. Developed with Flutter.
apps.longDescription: Whistle SOS (Deprem Düdüğü) turns your smartphone into a powerful emergency whistle during earthquake situations. If you are trapped and need to signal your location to rescuers, simply open the app and activate the whistle — no internet or phone service required. Developed with Flutter for both Android and iOS.
features: Loud emergency whistle — no internet required

apps.name: Wordle Game
apps.subtitle: Word guessing game.
apps.description: Word puzzle game built with React Native.
apps.longDescription: Word puzzle game built with React Native.

apps.name: World Vibe Web
apps.subtitle: The distributed app store, on your desktop
apps.description: A native desktop app for wvw.dev — browse, discover, and install vibe-coded open-source apps from across GitHub without opening a browser.
apps.longDescription: World Vibe Web desktop brings the full wvw.dev experience to your menu bar. Browse the community-curated catalog of open-source apps, read reviews, view screenshots, and install via Homebrew or direct download — all from a native window with macOS title bar integration. External links open in your default browser. Built with Tauri and Rust for a lightweight, fast experience. Available for macOS (Apple Silicon & Intel), Windows, and Linux.
features: Native desktop app powered by Tauri
Available for macOS, Windows, and Linux
Lightweight — no Electron, built with Rust

apps.name: yâdet
apps.subtitle: Remote Cemetery Care Platform
apps.description: A mobile-first cemetery care platform that enables remote grave maintenance. Users can publish care requests, while local service providers accept tasks and complete them on-site — making it possible to manage and monitor cemetery services from anywhere.
apps.longDescription: yâdet is a mobile-first platform designed for remote grave maintenance. Whether you live far from your loved ones’ burial site or simply cannot visit regularly, yâdet connects you with trusted local service providers who complete care tasks on-site. You can publish requests, receive photo updates, and monitor progress — all from your phone, anywhere in the world.
features: Local service providers accept and complete tasks on-site
Photo updates and task monitoring from anywhere
